title: Headings, Paragraphs & Lists
objectives: Use heading tags (h1-h6) to create a content hierarchy
Write paragraphs and apply emphasis with <strong> and <em>
Build ordered and unordered lists to organize information
hints: Headings go from h1 (most important) to h6 (least) — use them in order, don't skip levels
<strong> means strong importance (usually bold), <em> means emphasis (usually italic)
<ul> creates bullet lists, <ol> creates numbered lists — both use <li> for items
assessmentCriteria: Page uses h1 through at least h3 in proper hierarchy
Content includes paragraphs with inline emphasis elements
Page contains both an ordered and unordered list
Lists have at least 3 items each
